data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: The site uses a responsive web design to adapt across various devices.
data.technical_spec: CSS media queries and fluid grid layouts.

data.title: Single Page Application
data.description: Elements of a single-page application approach to improve performance and user experience.
data.technical_spec: JavaScript frameworks like React or Vue.js.

data.title: Global Content Delivery Network
data.description: Use of a CDN to deliver content globally with reduced latency.
data.technical_spec: Akamai or Cloudflare for distributing static assets.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Decoupled services for scalability and maintainability.
data.technical_spec: RESTful APIs and Docker containers for services.

data.title: Accessibility Features
data.description: Enhanced accessibility features to ensure inclusive usage.
